reviews.review_description: This game has always been really good. There's always lots of updates to keep it fun and new. My friend, Axo, made this game and I really like it. My favorite part are the maps/areas. The cosmetics are also very uniqe. Overall, it is a good game. The only thing is there isn't always people online to play.

Send your day out
People play with the game 
Congratulations creator
One more question 
Can I become a moderator or not? 
It’s OK you say no 
Say yes
It’s ok
Fire ah game ngl
Very very good game

Hear me out on this.

I was just trying to play waiting for the other players to get out of horror so we can play the game is really fun but when I was waiting I made a joke about the microphone this mod named demon told me not to make those jokes so I said ok anyway he still kicked me I said sorry but he still kicked me then he let me be I hit something and I cursed and I got kicked he kept on trying to kick then he stopped again I said the trampoline ￼looks funny he kicked me then I cursed again and I had enough  of it so I ran for around 15 minutes then he said even tho you know swizzy a little bit he can’t do anything I said ok then Demond started talking smack about swizzy and how he plays gorillatag all day long I said no he doesn’t he is just good.now I got on the game and I am banned so I am banned for saying sh*t and saying something about the microphone and I said sorry I would play the game more if they had not so bad mods

The moderators was banding me for no reason while I was peacefully playing and looking around the map he kept on chasing me and trying to kick me out of the lobby. If you fixed your moderators, I feel that this would be a very good game, but the moderators are not good moderators
This game is still a work in progress and I can’t wait to see where it ends up. Keep up the work man you’ll get this out there some day.

reviews.review_title: Can I get my finger painter badge?
reviews.review_description: This game is so good

10STARS!!!!!!!!!! Such an awesome work out! Climbing trees, flying in space, being chased by creatures really keeps you moving! Anytime I play this game it runs smooth and is a fun time. Very cool! Will continue to play and watch for more updates! Thanks Axo for sharing your gaming talents!
